title: Friendly Guards
description: A very lightweight Fabric mod that disables retaliation from Iron Golems and Guard Villagers when the damage source is a player.
body:
**DISCLAIMER:
This was originally created for personal use, and updates or support may be limited or infrequent.**

A very lightweight Fabric mod for 1.21.5 that disables retaliation from Iron Golems and Guard Villagers when the damage source is a player. The goal is to prevent accidental friendly fire from turning defenders hostile while leaving their normal behaviour untouched.

- Made to work with [Guard Villagers (Fabric) Fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcmassok-guardvillagers-fork).
- Clears player-sourced anger without suppressing anger toward hostile mobs.
- Server-friendly with no client configuration required.

**PLANNED:**
- 1.21-1.21.10
